mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_alarm_rule( tenant_id, org_id, device_group_key, name, source_type, severity, trigger_mode, duration_seconds, recovery_mode, dedup_mode, enabled, condition_json, is_delete, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{deviceGroupKey}, #{name}, #{sourceType}, #{severity}, #{triggerMode}, #{durationSeconds}, #{recoveryMode}, #{dedupMode}, #{enabled}, #{conditionJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm_rule SET device_group_key = #{deviceGroupKey}, name = #{name}, source_type = #{sourceType}, severity = #{severity}, trigger_mode = #{triggerMode}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, recovery_mode = #{recoveryMode}, dedup_mode = #{dedupMode}, enabled = #{enabled}, condition_json = #{conditionJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_alarm_rule WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_alarm_rule SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
